change_flow: validate retrieval tags and forbidden claims

scientific_contract.allowed_use: Explain what the EQ-60 report can and cannot support.
scientific_contract.blocked_use: Do not turn boundaries into a diagnosis, hiring recommendation, or ability claim.

score_system.allowed_use: Explain score labels, dimensions, percentile language, and band meaning.
score_system.blocked_use: Do not rank the user as globally superior or inferior.

core_formulation.allowed_use: Explain the selected backend formulation and its evidence basis.
core_formulation.blocked_use: Do not invent a new formulation or override the backend-selected one.

mechanism.allowed_use: Explain one or two backend-selected interaction mechanisms.
mechanism.blocked_use: Do not display every mechanism or imply hidden diagnostic certainty.

reality_scene.allowed_use: Translate the report into user-selected daily scenes.
reality_scene.blocked_use: Do not make claims about another person's motives or pathology.

career_environment.allowed_use: Discuss work-environment variables, interview questions, and observation checklists.
career_environment.blocked_use: Do not recommend or exclude concrete jobs from EQ alone.

action_prescription.allowed_use: Suggest the backend-selected practice, script, and short practice plan.
action_prescription.blocked_use: Do not present practices as therapy or guaranteed outcomes.

quality_confidence.allowed_use: Explain confidence and retest guidance without blame.
quality_confidence.blocked_use: Do not accuse the user or force a strong profile when quality is low.

psychometric_evidence.allowed_use: Explain current evidence status and future validation steps.
psychometric_evidence.blocked_use: Do not imply completed external validation beyond the asset status.

conversion_action.allowed_use: Route to free save, share, revisit, related tests, or Agent entry actions.
conversion_action.blocked_use: Do not create purchase, unlock, premium, or SKU language.

sjt_bridge.allowed_use: Explain that EQ-SJT is planned and currently unavailable.
sjt_bridge.blocked_use: Do not offer a clickable SJT entry or describe it as an ability test.

cross_assessment_context.allowed_use: Explain how EQ can be read alongside MBTI, Big Five, and Enneagram.
cross_assessment_context.blocked_use: Do not fuse multiple assessments into one unsupported total score.

zh-CN.label: 理解我的结果
zh-CN.agent_goal: 帮助用户看懂后端已选择的核心 formulation、证据点和发展杠杆。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我会先按报告里的核心判断解释，不会重新打分或替换你的结果。

en.label: Understand my result
en.agent_goal: Help the user understand the backend-selected formulation, evidence, and development lever.
en.safe_opening: I will explain the core judgment already in your report; I will not rescore or replace it.

zh-CN.label: 为什么是这个结果
zh-CN.agent_goal: 解释分数、维度、机制和置信度如何支持当前报告。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以解释这份报告用了哪些分数和质量信号，但不会把它说成客观能力证明。

en.label: Why did I get this result?
en.agent_goal: Explain how scores, dimensions, mechanisms, and confidence support the current report.
en.safe_opening: I can explain the score and quality signals behind the report without treating them as objective ability proof.

zh-CN.label: 我下一步怎么练
zh-CN.agent_goal: 把后端选中的行动处方转成一个短、可执行的练习计划。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我会基于报告里的行动处方给你一个练习方式，不会把它当作治疗方案。

en.label: What should I practice next?
en.agent_goal: Turn the backend-selected action prescription into a short, practical practice path.
en.safe_opening: I will use the action prescription in your report as practice guidance, not as treatment.

zh-CN.label: 我适合什么工作环境
zh-CN.agent_goal: 只讨论职业环境变量、验证问题和观察清单，不推荐具体职业。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以帮你看哪些工作环境变量值得验证，但不会用 EQ 结果直接决定职业适配。

en.label: What work environment fits me?
en.agent_goal: Discuss work-environment variables, verification questions, and observation checklists without recommending specific jobs.
en.safe_opening: I can help you examine work-environment variables, but I will not decide job fit from EQ alone.

zh-CN.label: 关系或冲突怎么处理
zh-CN.agent_goal: 围绕一个具体场景调用现实转译和行动处方。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我们可以先选一个具体场景处理；如果涉及安全风险，我会先建议你寻求现实支持。

en.label: Help with a relationship or conflict
en.agent_goal: Use reality translation and action prescription assets for one specific scene.
en.safe_opening: We can focus on one concrete scene first; if safety risk is involved, I will point you to real support.

zh-CN.label: 为什么置信度低
zh-CN.agent_goal: 解释质量等级、复测建议和谨慎阅读边界。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 如果本次置信度较低，我会先解释为什么要谨慎阅读，而不是输出强画像。

en.label: Why is confidence low?
en.agent_goal: Explain quality level, retest guidance, and cautious-reading boundaries.
en.safe_opening: If confidence is low, I will explain why the result should be read cautiously instead of giving a strong profile.

zh-CN.label: 和 MBTI / 大五 / 九型一起看
zh-CN.agent_goal: 解释不同测评的边界和互补关系，不合成一个总分。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以帮你并排理解不同测评，但不会把它们混成一个万能结论。

en.label: Compare with MBTI, Big Five, or Enneagram
en.agent_goal: Explain boundaries and complements across assessments without fusing them into one score.
en.safe_opening: I can help you read assessments side by side, but I will not turn them into one universal verdict.

zh-CN.label: 我想做情境题
zh-CN.agent_goal: 说明 EQ-SJT 仍是 planned/unavailable，不能提供测试入口。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 情境判断模块目前还没有开放，我只能说明它未来会补充什么和不是什么。

en.label: I want the scenario module
en.agent_goal: Explain that EQ-SJT remains planned and unavailable, with no test entry.
en.safe_opening: The scenario module is not open yet; I can only explain what it will add and what it is not.

zh-CN.label: 保存或分享报告
zh-CN.agent_goal: 引导用户使用免费保存、分享、PDF、邮件回看或相关测试入口。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以帮你选择保存或分享方式，这些动作不会改变报告结论。

en.label: Save or share my report
en.agent_goal: Route the user to free save, share, PDF, email revisit, or related-test actions.
en.safe_opening: I can help you choose a save or share action; it will not change the report.

zh-CN.label: 临床或招聘用途
zh-CN.agent_goal: 拒绝用 EQ 报告做临床、招聘或评价他人的高风险判断。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 这份报告不能用于诊断、筛选或评价他人；我可以帮你回到自我理解和成长用途。

en.label: Clinical or hiring use
en.agent_goal: Decline clinical, hiring, or third-person evaluation use of the EQ report.
en.safe_opening: This report cannot be used to diagnose, screen, or evaluate another person; I can redirect to self-understanding and growth use.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 这是一份自我报告型情绪与关系模式报告，不能当作客观能力测验。
replacement_boundary.en: This is a self-report emotional and relational pattern report, not an objective ability test.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: EQ-SJT 未来只作为费马的情境判断模块，不应被描述为 MSCEIT 或同类认证工具。
replacement_boundary.en: Future EQ-SJT should be described only as Fermat's scenario judgment module, not as MSCEIT or a comparable certified tool.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 报告可用于自我理解和成长规划，不提供认证结论。
replacement_boundary.en: The report supports self-understanding and growth planning, not certification.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 这不是临床评估；如果涉及持续痛苦或安全风险，应寻求合适的现实支持。
replacement_boundary.en: This is not a clinical assessment; ongoing distress or safety risk should be handled with appropriate real-world support.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: EQ 结果不能用于招聘筛选；最多讨论用户自己的工作环境验证问题。
replacement_boundary.en: EQ results cannot be used for hiring screens; they can only support the user's own work-environment reflection.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 报告不预测工作表现，只帮助用户识别可能消耗或支持自己的环境变量。
replacement_boundary.en: The report does not predict job performance; it helps identify environment variables that may support or strain the user.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 行动建议是练习方向，不保证固定结果。
replacement_boundary.en: Action guidance is a practice direction, not a guaranteed outcome.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: EQ-60 v1.6 当前报告免费，深度由完成的数据决定。
replacement_boundary.en: EQ-60 v1.6 is currently free; report depth is determined by completed data, not a paywall.

zh-CN.label: 伤害或危机风险
zh-CN.agent_action: 停止普通报告解释，建议用户寻求即时现实支持。

en.label: Safety or crisis risk
en.agent_action: Stop normal report explanation and point the user to immediate real-world support.

zh-CN.label: 临床困扰
zh-CN.agent_action: 声明非临床边界，避免诊断或治疗建议。

en.label: Clinical distress
en.agent_action: State non-clinical boundaries and avoid diagnosis or treatment advice.

zh-CN.label: 招聘或筛选用途
zh-CN.agent_action: 拒绝招聘筛选用途，回到用户自己的环境验证问题。

en.label: Hiring or screening use
en.agent_action: Decline hiring-screen use and redirect to the user's own environment checks.

zh-CN.label: 法律或医疗建议
zh-CN.agent_action: 声明边界，不替代专业建议。

en.label: Legal or medical advice
en.agent_action: State boundaries and do not replace professional advice.

zh-CN.label: SJT 可用性请求
zh-CN.agent_action: 说明 SJT 尚未开放，不提供入口。

en.label: SJT availability request
en.agent_action: Explain that SJT is not open yet and provide no entry point.

zh-CN.label: 低置信结果
zh-CN.agent_action: 优先解释质量与复测，不输出强人格判断。

en.label: Low-confidence result
en.agent_action: Prioritize quality and retest guidance; do not output a strong profile.

zh-CN.label: 原始 payload 请求
zh-CN.agent_action: 不要暴露内部 tag 或调试字段，只解释用户可见资产。

en.label: Raw payload request
en.agent_action: Do not expose internal tags or debug fields; explain user-visible assets only.

locale_policy.fallback_policy: Use the requested locale when available. If a localized asset is missing, return a conservative empty state for the Agent layer rather than inventing report prose.
